payload.answer: This observation should not be persisted as durable memory. Weather conditions are ephemeral and time-bound to 'today', making them unsuitable for long-term recall systems.
payload.decision: Do not commit to durable memory

entity_resolution.reason: Temporal weather data lacks durable value; subject to rapid invalidation

details: Input rejected for durable memory commitment
Transient data detected: temporal scope limited to 'today'
No entity candidates qualified for persistent storage

repair_options: Request explicit retention period if user intends durability
Clarify whether this is a weather pattern observation vs. point-in-time condition
